channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Michelin-starred Chinese restaurant Yingtao updates family recipes
item.description: Chef Emily Yuen gives a modern twist to traditional family recipes from Xi'an, Shanghai and Hong Kong at Yingtao, a Michelin-starred Chinese rest...

item.title: Mullin threatens to withhold aid if states do not comply with DHS election directives
item.description: DHS Secretary Markwayne Mullin warned that states failing to follow the administration's voting roll policies could lose federal election funding.

item.title: This week on "Sunday Morning" (July 19)
item.description: A preview of the features for this week's broadcast of the Emmy-winning program, hosted by Jane Pauley.

item.title: Documents touted by Trump say election systems 'would be difficult to manipulate'
item.description: Declassified documents cited by President Trump during his election address contradicted some of his claims about vulnerabilities in the election system.
